prompt_text:
### Demographics: 58-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); History of myocardial infarction
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.9 kg; Height 162.2 cm; BMI 29.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/87 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 9.6%; 3 months ago 10.1%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 245mg/dL; 9 months ago 255mg/dL; 6 months ago 206mg/dL; 3 months ago 227mg/dL; current 265mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.9kg; 9 months ago 79.1kg; 6 months ago 77.1kg; 3 months ago 74.9kg; current 77.9kg), Height (12 months ago 162.2cm; 9 months ago 162.2cm; 6 months ago 162.2cm; 3 months ago 162.2cm; current 162.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 146mmHg; 9 months ago 146mmHg; 6 months ago 147mmHg; 3 months ago 145mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 87mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 45U/L; 6 months ago 51U/L; 3 months ago 52U/L; current 50U/L), AST (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 36U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 34U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 64mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 68mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 63mL/min/1.73m²; current 65mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 64mg/g; 9 months ago 67mg/g; 6 months ago 65mg/g; 3 months ago 65mg/g; current 57mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 114mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 112mg/dL; current 103mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
